materials.title: Algebra Basics Revision Notes
materials.description: A concise review of variables, expressions, identities, and equation-solving basics for Class 10 algebra.

materials.title: Practice Set: Algebra Word Problems
materials.description: Targeted practice problems for translating word problems into equations and solving them step by step.

materials.description: Concept explanation covering standard form, factorization, completing the square, and the quadratic formula.

materials.description: A short drill focused on identifying coefficients, discriminants, roots, and common exam mistakes.

materials.title: Ray Diagrams Explained
materials.description: Visual explanation of mirror and lens ray diagrams, image formation rules, and sign convention.

materials.title: Linear Equations Quick Recap
materials.description: A fast recap for Arjun's strong area, useful as a warm-up before Algebra practice.
